title: Mia is Back
titleNative: 미아가 돌아왔다
synopsis: Mi-A was Tae-Su's first love, who suddenly disappeared one day. After five years of silence, she reappears as a freshman at his university. But she's not the girl he remembers. He plays it cool, trying to ignore her, but can first love truly be forgotten? Or w

title: Neoman Boindan Mariya
titleNative: 너만 보인단 말이야
synonyms: You’re the Only One I Can See
synopsis: Following the advice of his imaginary friend Jason, who told him, "Treat all girls like stones," Park Jin-yong starts seeing every girl as a stone. But then Sunwoo, a female student who doesn’t look like a stone, appears before him, and for the first time in five years, the sight of a girl’s face sends Jinyong’s happy little circuits into overdrive... (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Tuojiang
titleNative: 脱缰
synonyms: Mad for Love
เอาตัวรอดจากรัชทายาทคลั่งรัก
synopsis: After traveling into a historical BL novel, the actor Lin Yan gains a special ability: fast-traveling through a skill called [Escape Death]. His first mission? To secretly orchestrate an attack on Prince Qi Zhen, which leads to the prince becoming the villain. Lin Yan’s first identity in this world is none other than Lin Shou Yan, the prince’s foolish fiancé. But as he plays his role, he accidentally captures the prince’s heart, and his fake death turns out to be the key reason Qi Zhen becomes a ruthless tyrant! A cold, overthinking tsundere prince and his scheming, perverted fiancé—chaos ensues! (Source: KuiaKan Manhua, translated)

Witches' War

Witches war: La gran guerra entre brujas
synopsis: Joan of Arc, the hero who saved France, was sentenced to be burned at the stake. But at the moment of her death, a demon sent her to another world. There, she found 32 women from across history, known as “witches.” With the addition of the final witch, Joan of Arc, Walpurgis Night begins: Only one witch can survive, and have her wish granted! (Source: Comikey)

synopsis: Yuta Okkotsu is a nervous high school student who is suffering from a serious problem—his childhood friend Rika has turned into a curse and won't leave him alone. Since Rika is no ordinary curse, his plight is noticed by Satoru Gojo, a teacher at Jujutsu High, a school where fledgling exorcists learn how to combat curses. Gojo convinces Yuta to enroll, but can he learn enough in time to confront the curse that haunts him? (Source: VIZ Media)

title: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleRomaji: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Daini no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
titleEnglish: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleNative: 転生賢者の異世界ライフ ～第二の職業を得て、世界最強になりました～
synonyms: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Dai-2 no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
Mein Isekai-Leben – Mit der Hilfe von Schleimen zum mächtigsten Magier einer anderen Welt
เกิดใหม่ในต่างโลกเป็นปราชญ์แกร่งสุดโดยไม่รู้ตัว
Life as a Reincarnated Sage in Another World ~Gaining a Second Profession and Becoming the Strongest in the World~
Réincarné dans un autre monde
Моє життя в Ісекаї
synopsis: Whether at the office or at home, corporate drone Yuji Sano works all the time. So when his home PC flashes a message about him being summoned to another world, Yuji restarts his machine...only to find that he's inadvertently accepted the summons! Now in a fantasy world far removed from paperwork and computers, Yuji has just one thing on his mind: waking up from what he thinks is a dream and getting back to the mountain of work he left behind! But this other world has other plans for Yuji, who quickly discovers his Monster Tamer character class allows him to befriend slimes! And thanks to their number, those slimes help him absorb so much magical knowledge that he gains a second character class in the blink of an eye! How will Yuji wield his power now that he's the greatest sage the realm has ever known?! And what about all that paperwork?! (Source: Square Enix)

title: NINE PEAKS
titleNative: NINE PEAKS
synopsis: Gaku Mashio was a first-year high school student who lived with his father. He lost his father in a sudden accident, just as he got suspended from school after getting into a fight. On the night of his father's wake, Gaku went fishing on the shore in memory of his father, but he fell into the sea and was returned 22 years into the past. Gaku's father, Harumi, who was the same age as Gaku at that time, saved him from the water. Harumi's parents (Gaku's grandparents) took a liking to Gaku, and accepted him into their family under the name Gaku Miyagi. His grandparents even encouraged him to go to Seiha High School, same as his father. Twenty-two years ago, the town of Kurei was full of delinquents. Now Gaku and his father will fight their way to the top of the town! (Source: Shonen Champion, translated)

titleNative: 双子まとめて『カノジョ』にしない？
synopsis: Chikage is a beautiful girl in my class who is smart and well-behaved. She is my rival in school, but after school, she has another face. After school, she plays in the arcade with an innocent smile that would be unimaginable in class. I try to make friends with Chikage on campus and play with her after school in order to get to know her better at both places. We grow closer to each other, until finally… a heartwarming triangular love comedy begins! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: TSUYOSHI: Daremo Katenai, Aitsu ni wa
titleRomaji: TSUYOSHI: Daremo Katenai, Aitsu ni wa
titleNative: TSUYOSHI 誰も勝てない、アイツには
synonyms: TSUYOSHI
TSUYOSHI: The one who no one can win against
Tsuyoshi ไอ้หนุ่มหมัดพิฆาตลูกป๋องแป๋ง
synopsis: Tsuyoshi Kawabata is just a regular convenience store employee in a mid-sized city west of Tokyo. Except... he also happens to be the most powerful fighter in the world. Although he doesn't particularly want to fight, his reputation precedes him, and martial artists come from all over the world to test their might against the mythical Tsuyoshi – and invariably end up handily beaten, clutching their battered family jewels in a convenience store parking lot. Should you wish to fight him, he has three rules to minimize inconvenience: 1) You only get one fight. There will be no rematch. 2) You will fight in a secluded area, where you won't be seen. 3) You will tell nobody about it – even if you lose.

synopsis: Kutsuzawa Yasuo is a gloomy loner with zero friends. As he walks home alone like always, he has a chance encounter with the class’s top-tier beauty a popular gyaru admired by everyone! After helping her when she nearly falls and fixing her bicycle, he plans to quietly leave... but she looks at him with sparkling eyes instead. A gloomy introvert and a cheerful extrovert who were never supposed to cross paths yet somehow, they begin to grow closer. Thus begins an awkward but heartwarming youthful romantic comedy between two opposites.

titleNative: きみの願いが叶うまで
synonyms: Until Your Wish Comes True
synopsis: For his high school debut, Minto Shishidou pretended to be an outgoing playboy, spinning lies about the girlfriends he goes through. This corner he backed himself into weighs heavily on his mind when he joins a school trip, and he’s determined to use the occasion to get a girlfriend for real. But then an unimaginable incident strikes him and his classmates, setting the stage for a locked-room love comedy centered around the wishes of these boys and girls. (Source: Natalie, translated)

tags.name: Gender Bending
tags.description: Prominently features a character who dresses and behaves in a way characteristic of another gender, or has been transformed into a person of another gender.

tags.name: Primarily Teen Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of teen characters.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.
